hooks.command: c=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); case "$c" in *"git commit"*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$c" in *CHANGELOG*) exit 0;; esac; [ -n "$(git status --porcelain -- CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"CHANGELOG reminder: CHANGELOG.md has not been touched in this change. Repo policy (CHANGELOG.md, Contributing section) says notable changes - content corrections, new pages, infra/security changes - must be recorded with a date and an Added/Changed/Fixed/Security category. Update CHANGELOG.md and include it in this commit if the change is notable. Trivial commits (typo fixes, WIP, merges, the changelog itself) may proceed without it.\"}}"
